services.meta_title: Marketing Services | Luis Serrano Marketing Services
services.meta_description: Websites, branding, digital strategy, ads and more. Professional marketing solutions for businesses in Mexico and the U.S.
services.hero_subtitle: From strategy to execution. Everything your brand needs to stand out.
services.service_1_desc: Custom, responsive, SEO-optimized websites. Modern design focused on conversion. Guaranteed delivery in 2 weeks.
services.service_2_desc: Full marketing strategy that integrates all channels and brand touchpoints to maximize results.
services.service_3_desc: Data-driven custom digital strategies: competitor analysis, audience definition, and a clear roadmap.
services.service_4_desc: Building a solid brand identity: brand manual, color palette, typography, voice and tone. Your brand, consistent everywhere.
services.service_5_desc: Creation of memorable, unique, and strategically positioned brand names for your target market.
services.service_6_desc: Full annual marketing plan with goals, KPIs, editorial calendar, and budget allocated by channel.
services.service_7_desc: Smart distribution of your marketing budget to maximize ROI according to your business objectives.
services.service_8_desc: Professional management of paid campaigns on Meta, Google, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Continuous optimization to reduce costs and increase conversions.
services.service_9_desc: Deep review of your current marketing: what's working, what's not, and where the opportunities are. Results with concrete recommendations.
services.service_10_desc: 1:1 strategic consulting sessions to resolve specific questions, review campaigns, or validate marketing decisions.
services.service_11_desc: Workshops and training programs for internal marketing teams. Digital marketing, ads, content, and strategy.
services.service_12_desc: Ongoing monthly support for brands that need an experienced CMO without hiring one full-time.

about.meta_description: Bilingual CMO with 10+ years of experience in digital marketing, branding and strategy for brands in Mexico and the United States.
about.bio_p1: I'm Luis Serrano, a CMO and marketing consultant with over a decade of experience building and scaling brands in Mexico and the United States. I've worked with startups and established companies, always with the same focus: measurable results and authentic brand narratives.
about.bio_p2: I specialize in digital strategy, brand positioning, and paid media. I'm bilingual (Spanish and English) and have experience leading remote and distributed teams on B2C and B2B projects. My approach combines conscious leadership with data-driven execution.
about.exp_1_desc: Leading marketing strategy for Latin American expansion. Management of digital campaigns, branding and demand generation.
about.exp_2_desc: Direction of the marketing team. Content strategy, paid media and events. +25% engagement year over year.
about.exp_3_desc: Creation and leadership of the marketing department. Campaign launch that generated +30% in sales and +50% in web traffic in 6 months.
about.exp_4_desc: Marketing coordination for U.S. and Mexico operations. +40% Instagram engagement with new content strategy.
about.exp_5_desc: Development and implementation of digital strategy. Video series that generated +35% engagement with the target audience.
about.exp_6_desc: Management of digital campaigns and starting point in the industry. Social media management, content, and agency collaboration.
about.philosophy_p1: I believe in conscious leadership: making informed, empathetic decisions focused on the long term. The most effective marketing doesn't shout; it connects. Brands that build authentic communities are the ones that last.
about.philosophy_p2: My process always starts with data and ends with narrative. I measure everything, iterate fast, and communicate clearly. If we work together, you'll know exactly what we're doing, why, and what the results are.

privacy.meta_title: Privacy Policy | Luis Serrano Marketing Services
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Luis Serrano Marketing Services (hereinafter, "the Controller") is committed to protecting the privacy of its users and clients. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and protect the personal information you provide to us.
privacy.s1_body: Through the contact form on this website, we collect: full name, email address, phone number, company name (optional), country of residence, service of interest, and message. We do not collect sensitive data such as financial information, biometric data, or special category information.
privacy.s2_body: The personal data you provide is used exclusively for: (a) responding to your inquiries and quote requests, (b) establishing a business relationship if you choose to do so, and (c) sending you relevant information about our services when you give us your explicit consent.
privacy.s3_body: The processing of your data is based on your explicit consent given when submitting the contact form, and on the implementation of pre-contractual measures at your request.
privacy.s4_body: We do not share your personal data with third parties, except as required by law. We use Web3Forms as a form submission service, which processes data securely and transmits it directly to our email address.
privacy.s5_body: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected, or until you request its deletion.
privacy.s6_body: In accordance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, you have the right to: Access your personal data, Rectify it if incorrect, Cancel it when no longer necessary, and Object to its processing. To exercise these rights, send an email to serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com with your request.
privacy.s7_body: If you are a resident of the European Union, you also have additional rights under the GDPR: right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Contact us at serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com to exercise any of these rights.
privacy.s8_body: All images, texts, and graphic elements on this site are the property of Luis Serrano Marketing Services and are protected by copyright. Their download, copying, or unauthorized use is prohibited. The site owner's photographs are protected by technical and legal measures.
privacy.s9_body: This site may use Google Analytics and Meta Pixel cookies to anonymously analyze web traffic. You can disable these cookies from your browser settings.
privacy.s10_body: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page with the update date.
privacy.s11_body: For any questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at: serranoluis94.ls@gmail.com

footer.tagline: Strategic marketing for brands that want to grow.
